tasks.title: TUI Focus Routing Fix
tasks.description: Fix keybinding system to respect FocusPanel. Pass focus to map_key_with_diff(), guard editor actions by Editor focus, add panel-specific handlers for Tracks/Grid/Macros/IntentConsole. Add tests for focus isolation.

tasks.title: Audio Playback Integration
tasks.description: Implement beat advancement in run() loop based on wall-clock time and BPM. Update current_beat, status.position_bars/beats each frame. Connect compiled events to EventScheduler for playback. Add tests for beat progression and status updates.

tasks.title: Grid Visualization Integration
tasks.description: Replace draw_grid() placeholder with actual grid rendering using project_events() from grid.rs. Store compiled events in App, render TrackGrid cells as styled text with track names, playback cursor. Add tests for grid accuracy.

tasks.title: TUI Help System & Onboarding
tasks.description: Create help.rs with HelpScreen modal overlay (? key). Display all keybindings by mode. Expand status bar with context-sensitive hints. Improve first-run tips. Add tests for help display and keybinding completeness.

tasks.title: TUI E2E & UI Test Suite
tasks.description: Comprehensive E2E tests: focus isolation, playback state transitions, grid rendering accuracy, help modal lifecycle, keybinding completeness, mode transitions, panel cycling, compile-on-edit. Headless terminal backend for automated testing.

tasks.title: Quantized Safe Updates
tasks.description: State changes snap to beat/bar boundaries. Hot reload with safe apply. Crash-resistant updates -- failures don't interrupt playback. Double-buffer swap for partial-state protection.

tasks.title: First-Run Feel Prompt
tasks.description: On launch: 'What should it feel like?' then generate editable DSL skeleton. Display full DSL, no hidden state. Skeleton is a starting point, fully editable.

tasks.title: Structural Intent (Diff Mode)
tasks.description: AST-level code diffs, track-safe and mapping-safe updates. Accept/reject required. Pipeline: Intent Input to Mode Detection to Taste Bias to Diff Generator to Preview to Accept/Reject to Apply.

tasks.title: Section Overrides
tasks.description: Section-aware mapping overrides activating on section entry. Precedence: layer additions > section overrides > base mappings. Explicit in DSL and visible in TUI.

tasks.title: OSC Support
tasks.description: Open Sound Control for networked control. Send/receive OSC messages. Map OSC addresses to macros and intent inputs.

tasks.title: Audio Engine Skeleton
tasks.description: Dedicated audio thread with cpal. Lock-free ring buffer for UI-audio communication. Double-buffer swap for safe state updates. Master limiter safety net. No allocations on audio thread. Pre-buffered event scheduling infrastructure.

tasks.title: Basic Drum Playback
tasks.description: WAV sample loading via hound. Sample-based drum kit triggered by scheduler events. Validates full pipeline end-to-end: hardcoded events to scheduler to audio engine to speakers.

tasks.title: Basic Instruments
tasks.description: Built-in synths: bass (mono), poly (pad), pluck/keys, noise/riser. Each receives events and produces audio samples. Basic FX chain: reverb, delay, drive, sidechain compression, limiter.

tasks.title: Sections & Quantized Transitions
tasks.description: Section model (name, length_in_bars, mapping_overrides). Quantized transition manager for bar-boundary changes. Scene jumping. Safe state commit. DSL support for sections.

tasks.title: Basic Intent System (Macro-Only)
tasks.description: Performance intent: macro deltas, mapping tweaks, layer toggles. Quantized apply on beat boundaries. Intent console in TUI. Pipeline: Intent Input to Mode Detection to Apply.

tasks.title: Diff Preview UI
tasks.description: Intent console panel for structural diff preview. Visual AST-level diff. Accept/reject controls. Full scope of changes visible -- no hidden mutations.

tasks.title: Stability Hardening
tasks.description: Crash-resistance during performance. Graceful error recovery without dropout. Stress testing. Buffer underrun handling. Audio thread watchdog. Error boundaries between layers.

tasks.title: Visualization Themes
tasks.description: Themeable TUI: color schemes, layout configs, visual styles. Built-in presets. User-defined themes via config. Hot-switching during performance.

tasks.title: Pattern Engine
tasks.description: AST to Track Graph to Event Stream to Audio Scheduler. Pattern repetition, variation, composition. Deterministic: same seed + same code = same events.

tasks.title: Grid Visualization & TUI
tasks.description: ratatui + crossterm TUI. Panels: editor, track list, grid (event stream projection), macro meters, performance controls. Hot reload of DSL blocks.

tasks.title: Macros & Mapping System
tasks.description: Macro engine: explicit declaration (name + value), mapping to target params with range and curve. Curves: linear, log, exp, smoothstep. Curve override support. Macro meters in TUI.

tasks.title: Layers
tasks.description: Layer model (name, mapping_additions, enabled). Enable/disable via intent. Stackable with mapping additions. Quantized toggling. Declared in DSL, controllable from TUI and intent console.

tasks.title: MIDI Controller Support
tasks.description: MIDI input from external controllers. CC to macro mapping. Note to trigger mapping. MIDI learn mode. Cross-platform via midir crate.

tasks.title: Performance Macros UX Polish
tasks.description: Smooth transitions, visual feedback, ergonomic shortcuts, macro grouping, quick-access controls. Optimized for stage use.

tasks.title: Plugin API
tasks.description: Extensible plugin system for instruments, effects, DSL extensions. Stable third-party API. Plugin discovery and loading. Sandboxed execution for audio thread safety.

tasks.title: Instrument Packs
tasks.description: Distributable instrument/sample packs. Pack format spec. Built-in pack manager. Curated starter packs.

tasks.title: Event Scheduling Core
tasks.description: Event data model (time in beats/bars, duration, track_id, note/sample, velocity, params). Deterministic scheduler processing events in time order. Beat/bar timing with configurable BPM. Seedable randomness. Transform pipeline.

tasks.title: Advanced Mapping Behavior
tasks.description: Stackable layer mappings with resolution order. Per-section and per-layer curve overrides. Section-aware overrides composing with layer additions. Multi-macro targeting through different curves.

tasks.title: Taste System
tasks.description: Opt-in learning at ~/.resonance/taste.yaml. Session + persistent learning. Tracks: preferred ranges, accepted diffs, undo patterns, macro movement. Influences proposal weighting. Inspectable, editable, resettable. Never auto-applies structural changes.

tasks.title: Advanced Visualization
tasks.description: Waveform display, spectrum analyzer, expressive grid rendering, macro movement trails, section timeline. Performance-oriented without compromising audio latency.

tasks.title: Community Contributions
tasks.description: Contribution guidelines, plugin registry, shared macro presets, community DSL snippets. Sharing infrastructure. Review process.

tasks.title: Project Scaffolding & Repo Setup
tasks.description: Initialize Rust project with Cargo.toml, module structure (audio/, event/, dsl/, macro_engine/, section/, intent/, taste/, tui/), .gitignore, CI configuration. Establish foundational crate dependencies: cpal, ratatui, crossterm, serde, ringbuf/crossbeam, hound.

tasks.title: DSL Parser
tasks.description: Lexer, parser, AST. Two syntax styles (declarative + functional chain) compiling to identical AST. Pipeline: DSL Source to Lexer to Parser to AST. Error reporting with line/column info.

tasks.title: Mini-Notation in Pattern Strings
tasks.description: Strudel-inspired mini-notation for functional chain pattern strings. Group repeat [X.]*N expands inner content N times. Element repeat X!N repeats a single step N times. Backward-compatible with existing single-character patterns. 12 parser tests + compiler round-trip test. DSL reference updated.
